market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Affordable Luxury: 4‑Bed Serviced Apt in City Centre
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to a bright, modern serviced apartment perfectly positioned in the heart of Newcastle. This entire home comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it ideal for families, small groups, or business travellers seeking space and convenience. At a nightly rate of £126.60, the apartment is priced 28% below the city’s median nightly rate of £175, offering excellent value for money. 

The property has earned 386 reviews with an average rating of 3.83, reflecting solid guest satisfaction while leaving room for improvement. Although it isn’t a Superhost listing yet, you’ll enjoy a self‑contained, fully equipped space that includes a living area, kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom, all designed with contemporary finishes. 

Located just minutes from Newcastle’s main attractions, restaurants, and transport links, you’ll have easy access to everything the city offers. Over the next 90 days the calendar shows only 16.3% occupancy (about 15 nights booked), indicating a significant opportunity to attract more guests—especially given the attractive price point. 

Whether you’re visiting for work, leisure, or a city break, this apartment provides the comfort of home with the flexibility of a serviced stay. Book now to enjoy a cost‑effective, centrally‑located Newcastle experience.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or secure bike storage
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution image of the living area with city views as the cover photo; it instantly showcases space and location, drawing guests in.
key_diagnosis: Increase the nightly rate from £126.6 to around £140 (still ~20% below the cohort median) to capture perceived value while keeping the 28% price advantage, leveraging the low 16.3% occupancy figure.
Add and highlight high‑value amenities—outdoor balcony, on‑site parking, and a Smart TV with streaming—to align with guest expectations and improve the 2/10 amenities score.

Refresh the photo gallery with at least 8 professional shots covering the living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, and exterior; set the living‑room view as the lead photo to boost the 3/10 images score.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your apartment is priced 28% below Newcastle’s average nightly rate yet sees only 16.3% occupancy over the next 90 days – a clear opportunity to boost bookings.
